description: A quality inspector needs to verify the full traceability of a critical turbine blade, from raw material to final installation.

nodes.task_description: Scan the serial number of the installed turbine blade.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly captures the serial number.

nodes.task_description: Query the manufacturing execution system (MES) to retrieve the blade's full production history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the complete history, including all manufacturing steps and inspections.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the history includes the certificate of conformance for the raw material batch used to forge the blade.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the linked certificate and confirms the material's origin and quality.
